main.description: A publicly discoverable photography setup. Opting in writes one of these to the user's own repo; its `registry` field links to a well-known discovery anchor so a shared backlink index (Constellation) can enumerate every published setup across the network without any backend.

registry.description: Discovery anchor. MUST equal the frozen HYPO_REGISTRY constant; it is the link Constellation indexes to find this setup.

name.description: Short human title for the setup, shown on its Discover card.

summary.description: Optional longer description of the setup.

gear.description: Optional AT-URIs of the author's app.graycard.* library items (cameras, lenses, film, scanners) to highlight.
